title: Desert Turns Snow-White: Rare Hailstorm Blankets Parts Of Rajasthan's Bikaner | WATCH
description: Rare hailstorm transformed parts of Rajasthan’s Thar Desert into a snow-like landscape in Bikaner’s Arjunsar region. Triggered by a Western Disturbance, the sudden weather shift has raised concerns over severe crop damage, here’s what caused it and its impact.
